# Step 3 — Edit Mode (Vendor & Pricing Allocation)

> Activated when the Purchase Officer clicks **Edit** from the PR Detail view. Unlocks vendor selection, unit price, discount, and tax profile fields on each line item. The PR remains `IN PROGRESS` during editing; status does not change on Save.

![Edit Mode — Expanded Rows](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 3.1 Access Path

```
PR Detail (step-02) → [Edit] button
```

The URL does not change: `/procurement/purchase-request/{uuid}`

**Permissions required:** Purchasing Staff role. Edit Mode is only available when the PR is at the Purchase workflow stage.

---

## 3.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PR List"] --> detail["2. PR Detail"]
    detail --> edit["3. Edit Mode - Vendor and Pricing"]
    edit --> actions["4. Workflow Actions - Approve / Reject / Send for Review"]
    actions --> done(["PR Advanced or Returned"])
    style edit fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 3.3 Page Layout (Edit Mode)

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ← Procurement / Purchase Request                               │
│  PR20260400060                  [Cancel] [Save] [Comment] [Approve] │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  HEADER INFO (read-only — same as PR Detail)                    │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  [Items ▼] [Workflow History]   [Collapse all] [Add Item] [Auto Allocate] │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  ITEMS GRID (columns expanded):                                  │
│  # │ Location │ Product │ Req │ Approved │ FOC │ Amount │ Currency │ │
│       ↳ Vendor [Select Vendor ▼] │ Unit Price │ Tax Profile │ Tax% │ Tax Amt │ Override │ Due In │
│  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────│
│  FINANCIAL SUMMARY (live-updating)                              │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 3.4 Editable Fields Per Line Item

| Field | Edit Permission | Description | Type | Validation | Business Logic |
|-------|----------------|-------------|------|------------|---------------|
| **Vendor** | **Editable** | Which supplier will fulfil this line item — the primary choice that drives pricing and MOQ checks | Dropdown / Select | Required before saving unit price | Shows approved vendors for item category; auto-suggested from purchase history |
| **Unit Price** | **Editable** | Price per base unit from the selected vendor — drives all financial calculations | Decimal | Price is 0 or more, 2 decimal places | Used to calculate item Amount = Approved Qty × Unit Price |
| **Discount Rate** | **Editable** | Percentage discount negotiated with vendor for this line | Percentage (%) | Between 0 and 100 | Discount Amount = Round(Amount × Rate, 2) |
| **Discount Override** | **Editable** | Manual fixed-amount discount that bypasses the percentage calculation | Decimal | Cannot exceed item Amount | Manual override bypasses percentage calculation |
| **Tax Profile** | **Editable** | Tax rule to apply (VAT, GST, etc.) — determines the tax rate automatically | Dropdown | Required if unit price > 0 | Defaults from product master; sets Tax Rate automatically |
| **Tax Rate** | View Only | Read-only rate derived from the selected Tax Profile | Percentage (%) | Auto-set from Tax Profile | Read-only; reflects selected profile rate |
| **Tax Amount** | View Only (auto) | System-calculated tax on this line item | Decimal | System-calculated | Tax Amt = Round(Net Amount × Tax Rate, 2) |
| **Tax Override** | **Editable** | Manual tax amount entry that overrides the system calculation — use when the vendor invoice shows a different tax figure | Decimal | Manual entry allowed | Overrides system-calculated tax amount |
| **FOC Quantity** | **Editable** | Free-of-charge quantity granted by vendor — not invoiced; hidden from Creator | Integer | 0 or more | Free of Charge quantity; hidden from Creator role |
| **Approved Quantity** | **Editable** | Final quantity to order — may be adjusted down from the requested qty | Decimal | 0 or more, 3 decimal places | Can be adjusted by Purchasing Staff (same capability as Approver) |
| **Currency** | **Editable** | Transaction currency for this line item — if different from base currency, dual amounts will display | Dropdown | Required | Select transaction currency; triggers exchange rate lookup |
| **Exchange Rate** | **Editable** | Rate used to convert line item currency to base currency — auto-populated but overridable | Decimal | 5 decimal places | Auto-populated from system; manually overridable |
| Due In | **Editable** | Expected delivery lead time note for this item | Text | — | Expected delivery time note per item |
| **Pricelist** | View Only | System pricelist number assigned to this line — display field showing which pricelist is active | Read-only | — | Shows "—" if no pricelist assigned; populated by Auto Allocate |

**Read-only in Edit Mode (purchaser cannot change):**

> ⚠️ **Documentation Gap (FR-PR-018):** The FOC Quantity field is documented as hidden from the Creator role, but BRD FR-PR-018 specifies broader visibility control rules not yet documented: which roles can see vs. set FOC quantities, whether FOC items are suppressed from printed/exported PR documents, and how FOC quantities interact with the Approved Quantity field in financial totals. Priority: Medium.

### Pricelist Icon (Price List Comparison)

Each expanded item row has a **blue Pricelist icon button** at the far right of the scrollable row — only visible after scrolling the items grid horizontally.

- **Trigger:** Click the blue circular icon (`aria-label="Pricelist"`) next to the Pricelist field
- **Opens:** "Price List Comparison" modal for that specific item
- **Modal contents:**
  - Item name + Req/Apv quantities in subtitle
  - Table: Vendor | Pricelist No | Unit | Price | Currency | Effective
  - Empty state: "No Price List Found" if no pricelist exists for the item
  - **Close** button (×) only — read-only lookup, no selection from this modal

> ⚠️ **Note:** The Pricelist icon is only visible after **scrolling right** in the items grid (items table is wider than 1280px viewport). The icon is positioned at the rightmost end of the expanded item row.
>
> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (FR-PR-028):** BRD FR-PR-028 specifies that Approvers should have read-only (👁️) access to this Price List Comparison. The icon is **absent from the Approver view** — HOD, FC, GM, and Owner do not see the Pricelist icon in either read-only or edit mode.

![Pricelist icon button — visible at far right after scrolling the item row](data:image/png;base64,)

![Price List Comparison modal — opens when Pricelist icon is clicked](data:image/png;base64,)

| Field | Edit Permission | Description |
|-------|----------------|-------------|
| Location | View Only | Item delivery location set by Creator |
| Item Name | View Only | Product name from catalog |
| Description | View Only | Item description / notes |
| Request Quantity | View Only | Original quantity from Creator |
| Delivery Point | View Only | Specific delivery sub-location |

> See FR-PR-011A Field Availability by Role table for full matrix.

---

## 3.5 Tax Profile Defaults

| Tax Profile | Default Rate |
|-------------|-------------|
| VAT | 7% |
| GST | 10% |
| SST | 6% |
| WHT | 3% |
| None | 0% |

Tax Rate field is read-only — it updates automatically when Tax Profile is selected.

---

## 3.6 Auto Allocate

The **Auto Allocate** button triggers the system's vendor scoring algorithm to automatically assign the best-scored vendor to each line item.

![Auto Allocate Result](data:image/png;base64,)

### How It Works (FR-PR-028)

| Factor | Weight | Scoring Rule |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| Preferred Item | 35% | Item is marked preferred for this vendor |
| Preferred Vendor | 25% | Vendor is department preferred |
| Price Score | 25% | Lower price = higher score |
| Rating | 10% | Vendor performance rating |
| Lead Time | 5% | Shorter lead time = higher score |

Formula: `score = (preferredItem × 0.35) + (preferredVendor × 0.25) + (priceScore × 0.25) + (rating × 0.10) + (leadTime × 0.05)`

### MOQ Validation

| Severity | Colour | Condition |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| INFO | Blue | ≥90% of MOQ met — minor adjustment suggested |
| WARNING | Yellow | 50–90% of MOQ met — quantity increase recommended |
| ERROR | Red | <50% of MOQ met — significant gap; may block submission |

### Vendor Override

If the purchaser selects a non-recommended vendor after Auto Allocate, the system requests an override reason:
- Better relationship
- Quality preference
- Delivery requirement
- Other (free text)

Override is recorded in the audit log with the price difference.

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** After clicking Auto Allocate on PR20260400060, the UI displayed "No price found for Tax Items" (banner at top-right). This indicates some items have no vendor pricing data in the system. Auto Allocate completed without error but left those items unallocated. The BRD does not describe this partial-allocation warning state — it should be documented as a known UI behaviour.

---

## 3.7 Action Buttons, Behaviour & Validation

> **Form states:** Read-Only Mode (before Edit clicked) → Edit Mode (after Edit clicked). Sections below apply to Edit Mode only.

### Button Summary

| Button | Color | Available: Edit Mode | Purpose / Use Case |
|--------|-------|---------------------|--------------------|
| **Cancel** | Outline / Secondary | ✅ Always | Discard all unsaved pricing/vendor changes and return to the read-only PR Detail — use when you want to abandon the current edit session |
| **Save** | Blue / Primary | ✅ Always | Persist vendor and pricing changes without advancing the PR — use to save work in progress |
| **Auto Allocate** | Outline / Tool | ✅ Always | Run vendor scoring to auto-assign the best vendor per item — use as a starting point before manual adjustments |
| **Add Item** | Outline / Secondary | ✅ Always | Append a new blank line item to the PR | 
| **Approve** | Green / Primary | ✅ Always | Advance the PR to the next workflow stage — opens Approve dialog without requiring Save first (TBC) |

### On Cancel

**Purpose / Use Case:** Exit Edit Mode and discard all unsaved changes — use when vendor/pricing entries are incorrect and you want to start over.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Unsaved changes exist | — | Changes discarded; returns to read-only PR Detail | TBC — no "Discard changes?" dialog was observed in the live UI |

### On Save

**Purpose / Use Case:** Persist vendor selection and pricing data without advancing the PR workflow — use to save partial work or confirm final allocation before approving.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Unit price is a number with 2 or fewer decimal places | FR-PR-003 | Change saved | Field highlighted with error |
| 2 | Discount rate is between 0 and 100 | FR-PR-011A | Change saved | Error shown on field |
| 3 | Tax Amount recalculates from Tax Profile | FR-PR-011A | Auto-calculated value saved | — |
| 4 | Exchange rate has 5 or fewer decimal places | FR-PR-003, FR-PR-029 | Saved with formatted rate | TBC |
| 5 | Approved Quantity is 0 or more | FR-PR-011A | Saved | Error shown |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** BRD implies vendor selection should be required before saving a unit price (FR-PR-020: "Vendor name required if unit_price is entered"). The live UI does not enforce this as a hard gate — Save button is always enabled. Confirm with dev team.

> ⚠️ **Documentation Gap (FR-PR-020):** Beyond the vendor-required validation gap above, BRD FR-PR-020 specifies additional pricing breakdown behaviour not yet documented: (a) auto-population of Unit Price from the assigned vendor's pricelist when a vendor is selected, (b) the exact precedence when multiple pricelists match (MOQ tier selection), and (c) the discount calculation sequence (whether discount applies before or after tax). Priority: Medium.

### On Auto Allocate

**Purpose / Use Case:** Let the system select the best-scored vendor for each unallocated line item — use at the start of the pricing session to establish a baseline before manual review.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Pricing data exists for item in vendor catalog | FR-PR-028 | Vendor and unit price pre-filled per scoring algorithm | Warning banner: "No price found for Tax Items"; item left unallocated |
| 2 | Requested quantity is at least MOQ (converted to base unit) | FR-PR-028 | MOQ met — vendor assigned at INFO level | MOQ alert shown (WARNING or ERROR severity) on item row |

### On Approve

**Purpose / Use Case:** Advance the PR to the next approval stage directly from Edit Mode — use when vendor allocation is complete and the PR is ready for financial review.

See step-04 §4.4 for full Approve validation.

---

## 3.9 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Source |
|---|------|--------|
| BR-01 | Vendor dropdown shows only approved vendors for the item category | FR-PR-011A |
| BR-02 | Tax Profile selection automatically sets Tax Rate (read-only) | FR-PR-011A |
| BR-03 | Override fields allow manual entry that bypasses calculation | FR-PR-011A |
| BR-04 | All price comparisons in Auto Allocate use prices normalized to base inventory unit | FR-PR-028 |
| BR-05 | Vendor override (non-recommended) requires reason captured in audit log | FR-PR-028 |
| BR-06 | Price comparison cache has 5-minute TTL; invalidated on quantity change | FR-PR-028 |
| BR-07 | Currency change triggers recalculation of all amounts at new exchange rate | FR-PR-029 |
| BR-08 | All changes tracked in audit log with before/after values | FR-PR-011A |
| BR-09 | FOC items automatically set unit price to 0 | FR-PR-011A |
| BR-10 | Item subtotal = Round(Quantity × Unit Price, 2) | FR-PR-003 |
| BR-11 | Net Amount = Round(Subtotal − Discount, 2) | FR-PR-003 |
| BR-12 | Tax Amount = Round(Net Amount × Tax Rate, 2) | FR-PR-003 |
| BR-13 | Quantity fields support 3 decimal places (e.g., 12.500 kg). Unit Price fields support 2 decimal places. | FR-PR-002 |
| BR-14 | Item subtotal = Round(Quantity × Unit Price, 2); rounding uses half-up method throughout the calculation chain. | FR-PR-002 / FR-PR-003 |

---

## 3.10 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| Auto Allocate finds no pricing data for any item | Warning banner shown; all items remain unallocated; Save still available |
| Purchaser manually overrides Auto Allocate vendor selection | Override reason dialog appears; choice and reason logged in audit trail |
| Item has MOQ ERROR severity | Red MOQ banner displayed on item row; purchaser must acknowledge or increase quantity |
| Discount override amount exceeds item subtotal | Validation error: "Discount cannot exceed item amount" (TBC) |
| Purchaser sets Tax Profile = None on a taxable item | Tax rate set to 0%; amount recalculates to 0 tax |
| Exchange rate manually changed from system default | System uses override rate for all calculations; audit log records rate change |
| Add Item in Edit Mode — same item already exists | Adds as new row (no duplicate check observed) |
| Save while another user has the PR open (concurrent edit) | Edit locking expected per BRD (FR-PR-011); behaviour in UI TBC |
| Approved Quantity set higher than Request Quantity | No UI block observed; audit trail captures change |

---

## 3.11 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|------------|
| Click **Cancel** | → step-02 PR Detail (changes discarded) |
| Click **Save** | → step-02 PR Detail (changes persisted) |
| Click **Approve** | → step-04 Approve dialog (opens inline or modal) |
| Click **Workflow History** tab | Workflow History tab — stays in edit mode |
| Click **Add Item** | New blank row appended to items grid |

---

## 3.12 API Endpoints

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid` | PATCH / PUT | Save vendor/pricing changes |
| `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid/auto-allocate` | POST | Trigger Auto Allocate scoring |
| `/procurement/vendors?item={itemId}` | GET | Fetch approved vendor list for item |
| `/procurement/currencies` | GET | Fetch active currency list with exchange rates |
| `lib/services/pr-auto-pricing-service.ts` | — | Server-side Auto Allocate orchestrator |
| `lib/services/vendor-allocation-service.ts` | — | Vendor scoring/ranking logic |

---

## Inventory Information in Expanded Item (FR-PR-017)

### Business Purpose

The Inventory Information panel answers two key questions for the Purchasing Staff before allocating a vendor:

| Field | Business Question |
|-------|------------------|
| **On Hand** | Is there already enough stock at this location? Is the PR quantity justified? |
| **On Order** | Is this item already covered by an existing PO? Would allocating create a duplicate order? |

### How to Access

In Edit Mode → Items tab → click **Expand all** → each item shows **Inventory Information** below the pricing fields.

### Inventory Information Fields

| Field | Description | Example |
|-------|-------------|---------|
| On Hand | Current stock quantity at item's location | 0 PCS |
| On Order | Quantity on existing active Purchase Orders | 0 PCS |
| Re-order Pt. | Minimum stock threshold before reorder triggered | 0 PCS |
| Re-stock | Quantity to restore par level | 0 PCS |
| Stock Level | Percentage of target stock held | 0.0% |

> **Note:** Inventory data is for the **item's assigned location only**. Cross-location stock visibility and inter-location transfer suggestions (BRD FR-PR-016) are not yet implemented. Purchasing Staff must check other locations manually.

> ⚠️ **Missing — Drill-through from On Hand / On Order:** Values are display-only. There is no link from On Hand or On Order figures to the inventory module or to the active PO responsible for on-order stock. Purchasing Staff must navigate to the inventory/PO modules separately to investigate.

![Expanded Item — Inventory Information (Purchaser Edit Mode)](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## Bulk Item Actions (FR-PR-026)

**Confirmed (2026-04-16, purchase@zebra.com, Edit Mode — via Select All dropdown).**

The item grid contains a compound "Select All" control (`<button role="checkbox" aria-label="Select all">`). Clicking it opens a **dropdown menu**, not a native checkbox. Select an option from the dropdown to activate checkboxes and reveal the bulk action toolbar above the items grid.

### How to Trigger the Bulk Toolbar

1. Enter **Edit Mode** (click the Edit button on the PR detail page)
2. Click the **"Select all" button** (top-left of items grid, looks like a checkbox)
3. A dropdown menu appears with:
   - **Select All Purchase Request Items (N Items)** — selects all rows; all row checkboxes turn checked
   - **Select Only Status Pending (N Items)** — selects only items in PENDING status
   - Cancel
4. Choose an option; the bulk action toolbar appears **above the items grid**

> **Note:** Clicking individual row checkboxes directly via JavaScript is unreliable in this React component — the "Select All" dropdown is the correct trigger mechanism.


![Purchaser Edit Mode — Select All dropdown with full bulk toolbar](data:image/png;base64,)

### Confirmed Bulk Buttons (Purchaser, Edit Mode, via Select All)

| Button | Colour | BRD Name | Status |
|--------|--------|----------|--------|
| **Approve** | Green | Approve Selected | ✅ Present |
| **Send for Review** | Outline/Orange | Return Selected | ✅ Present |
| **Reject** | Red | Reject Selected | ✅ Present |
| **Split** | Outline | Split | ✅ Present |
| Set Date Required | — | Set Date Required | ❌ Not present |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (label):** BRD FR-PR-026 names the action "Return Selected". The live UI button is labelled **"Send for Review"**. Functionally equivalent (returns item to prior stage for rework). Same discrepancy exists in the Approver role.

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (missing action):** BRD FR-PR-026 includes **Set Date Required** as a bulk action for Purchasing Staff. This button is **absent** from the live UI for both Purchaser and Approver roles.

### Read-Only Mode

Checkboxes are visible in read-only mode. The same "Select All" dropdown mechanism is expected to apply; not separately verified — assumed same as Edit Mode based on shared component.

---

## Undocumented Features — Purchaser Relevance

The following BRD requirements affect the Purchase Officer persona but have not yet been captured in this document or any current step doc for this persona.

| FR | Title | Priority | BRD Status | Notes |
|----|-------|----------|------------|-------|
| FR-PR-012 | Copy & Template | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Purchaser may initiate PRs from templates or copy existing PRs — no live UI evidence observed |
| FR-PR-014 | Notifications | High | 🚧 Pending | Email alerts to Purchaser on PR assignment, escalation, and approval outcome — not implemented in live UI |
| FR-PR-015 | Mobile Responsiveness | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Edit Mode form usability on mobile viewports, touch target sizing — not verified |
| FR-PR-021 | Item Metadata Enhancement | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Required Date and Delivery Point comments per line item — fields not observed in Edit Mode |
| FR-PR-022 | Delivery Point Dropdown | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Typeahead with master data filtering for Delivery Point — not documented for Purchaser edit fields |
| FR-PR-025 | Monetary Formatting | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Locale-aware formatting for Unit Price, Discount, Tax Amount inputs — auto-format on blur not verified |
